title: Gateway mesh_to_mesh forwarding path with is_local_mesh + RPL SRH
description: Implement the missing mesh-to-mesh forwarding for packets received from mesh whose dst matches local RPL routes. Currently dropped in forward_mesh_to_upstream. Integrate with DaoManager/RoutingTable for path lookup, insert SourceRoutingHeader per RFC6554, re-compress with SCHC rule that supports RPL extension, queue to SLIP/sim TX channel. Update Gateway, lichend.rs run_* functions, tests. Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix. Parent epic project-LICHEN-3k6w. 3 codereview passes mandatory.
